display_text: Outworld Destroyer Aghanim's Scepter: Provides a strong dispel and damage barrier when health drops below 20%. This upgrade counters burst damage and control effects, ensuring Outworld Destroyer survives critical health moments and maintains teamfight presence.
search_text: Outworld Destroyer Aghanim Scepter counter-burst anti-control strong dispel damage barrier survival upgrade

display_text: Outworld Destroyer Aghanim's Shard: Astral Imprisonment deals damage in an area and allows allies to move at 70% speed while imprisoned. This upgrade counters area denial and enhances team mobility during fights, enabling safer positioning and escapes.
search_text: Outworld Destroyer Aghanim Shard counter-area control mobility team utility Astral Imprisonment upgrade
